- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	- User requested a SUG (Student Union Government) election voting application for school voting

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	- Created complete project structure with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
	- Used localStorage for data persistence (no backend required)

- [x] Customize the Project
	- Implemented all features: admin dashboard, voter registration, voting, results
	- Added sample data for elections and candidates

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	- No extensions needed for this project

- [x] Compile the Project
	- No compilation needed - static HTML/CSS/JS files

- [x] Create and Run Task
	- No task needed - open index.html in browser to run
